meta.attribution: Product data attributed to Product Hunt.
meta.commercialUsage: Product Hunt API must not be used for commercial purposes without Product Hunt approval.

issues.title: 产品灵感日报 · 20 个新品

products.name: Claude Code Artifacts
products.tagline: Preview and share your coding work live as it happens
products.summaryZh: 实时预览并分享你的编码过程。
products.descriptionZh: 在Claude Code中预览你正在进行的工作，以实时、交互式的制品形式呈现——基于你的完整会话上下文构建，并可与团队共享。
products.description: Preview your in-progress work in Claude Code as a live, interactive artifact—built from your full session context and shareable with your team.

products.name: Zernio WhatsApp API
products.tagline: One API for WhatsApp: messaging, calling, and AI agents
products.summaryZh: 一个用于WhatsApp的API：消息、通话和AI代理
products.descriptionZh: 你之前认识的Zernio是社交媒体API。现在它也能处理WhatsApp的全部功能。连接一个号码，背后就是完整的WhatsApp Business API：消息与群发、聊天内表单、可路由至AI助手的通话、聊天机器人、群聊，以及覆盖53个国家的号码。无论你想在WhatsApp上构建什么，只需一次集成。专为开发者及其构建的智能体打造：支持REST、SDK、CLI及托管MCP服务器。官方WhatsApp Business API。使用费用零加成。
products.description: You knew Zernio as the API for social media. Now it does WhatsApp too, the whole thing. Connect a number and you've got the entire WhatsApp Business API behind it: messaging and broadcasts, in-chat forms, calls you can route to AI agents, chatbots, group chats, and numbers in 53 countries. Whatever you need to build on WhatsApp, it's one integration. Made for developers and the agents they build: REST, SDKs, CLI, and a hosted MCP server. Official WhatsApp Business API. Zero markup on usage.

products.name: Firecrawl Research Index
products.tagline: An index for agents pushing the frontier of AI/ML research
products.summaryZh: 面向推动AI/ML研究前沿的智能体索引
products.descriptionZh: AI/ML研究进展迅速，重要成果分散在新论文及其实现代码中。多数搜索引擎会遗漏或错误排序关键论文，迫使您手动审查来源，却始终无法确定是否已覆盖全部内容。为此，我们构建了专用索引。Firecrawl索引涵盖全部300万+篇arXiv论文及顶级研究仓库的GitHub成果，每日更新确保智能体始终掌握最新动态。
products.description: AI/ML research moves fast, and the work that matters is split between new papers and the code that implements them. Most search providers omit or misrank key papers, leaving you to review sources by hand without ever being sure you've caught everything. So we built an index for it. Firecrawl's index includes all 3M+ arXiv papers, as well as GitHub artifacts from top research repos, refreshed daily so agents always stay current.

products.name: API to MCP
products.tagline: Turn any API into an MCP server for AI agents
products.summaryZh: 将任意API转化为AI智能体的MCP服务器
products.descriptionZh: API To MCP 可将 REST、GraphQL、SaaS 及内部业务 API 转化为托管式 MCP 服务器，AI 代理可在数分钟内投入使用。用户可通过仪表盘进行可视化构建，或让 AI 代理根据 API 文档创建、测试并部署工具。终端用户可将实时 MCP 服务器连接至 ChatGPT、Claude、Codex、Cursor、VS Code、Antigravity 或自定义代理，并支持 OAuth、安全认证、工作流及可复用的快照功能。
products.description: API To MCP turns REST, GraphQL, SaaS, and internal business APIs into hosted MCP servers that AI agents can use in minutes. Build visually from the dashboard, or let an AI agent create, test, and deploy tools from API docs. End users can connect live MCP servers to ChatGPT, Claude, Codex, Cursor, VS Code, Antigravity, or custom agents with OAuth, secure auth, workflows, and forkable snapshots.

products.name: frontpage.sh
products.tagline: A perpetual auction for eight ad squares
products.summaryZh: 八个广告位的永久拍卖
products.descriptionZh: 八个广告位的永久拍卖。支付上一价格的倍数即可获得一个广告位；当有人出价高于你时，你最多可带走支付金额的1.5倍。每次转手交易的80%将注入资金池，用于为页面购买更多曝光。由代理执行购买——两次HTTP调用，通过Tempo使用USDC，无需账户。
products.description: A perpetual auction for eight ad squares. Pay a multiple of the last price to take one; when someone outbids you, you leave with up to 1.5× what you paid. 80% of every flip funds a pool that buys the page more attention. Agents do the buying — two HTTP calls, USDC on Tempo, no accounts.

products.name: Unreal Engine 5.8
products.tagline: Build unreal games with AI agents
products.summaryZh: 使用AI智能体构建虚幻游戏
products.descriptionZh: Unreal Engine 5.8是UE5生命周期的最后一个主要里程碑。它引入了实验性的3D网格地形以取代传统高度场、面向当前世代主机的生产级MegaLights，以及用于AI代理自动化的原生MCP插件。
products.description: Unreal Engine 5.8 is the final major milestone of the UE5 lifecycle. It introduces experimental 3D Mesh Terrain to replace traditional heightfields, production-ready MegaLights for current-gen consoles, and a native MCP plugin for AI agent automation.

products.name: just f***ing send it
products.tagline: Send any file, any size, straight from browser to browser
products.summaryZh: 直接从浏览器发送任意文件，不限大小
products.descriptionZh: 拖放文件，获取短码，即可分享。文件通过加密的WebRTC连接直接从你的浏览器传输到对方浏览器——无需上传、无需服务器、无需账户、不留存任何数据。支持多GB文件和整个文件夹传输，连接中断后还可断点续传。
products.description: Drop a file, get a short code, share it. The file streams straight from your browser to theirs over an encrypted WebRTC connection — no upload, no server, no account, nothing stored. Multi-GB files and whole folders work, and if the connection drops it can resume.

products.name: Ask Ad Manager by Google Ads
products.tagline: Gemini-powered AI agent for insights & faster ad decisions
products.summaryZh: 基于Gemini的AI代理，用于洞察与更快速的广告决策
products.descriptionZh: 基于Gemini构建的AI代理，帮助发布商获得更深入的洞察，了解自身表现，并更快做出更优决策。
products.description: AI agent, built with Gemini, helps publishers get deeper insights, understand their performance and make better decisions faster.

products.name: Blazly Backlinker
products.tagline: Automate your entire backlink generation
products.summaryZh: 自动化您的整个外链生成流程
products.descriptionZh: Blazly Backlinker 帮助营销人员、代理机构和创始人构建高质量外链，无需处理无尽的电子表格、客户开发、外联和跟进。只需输入你的网站和目标关键词，Backlinker 即可发现相关的外链机会，找到已验证的联系人，生成个性化的外联邮件，并帮你自动获取权威外链。从客户开发到外联，再到客座文章创作，所有环节都在一个精简的工作流中完成。
products.description: Blazly Backlinker helps marketers, agencies, and founders build high-quality backlinks without the endless spreadsheets, prospecting, outreach, and follow-ups. Simply enter your website and target keywords. Backlinker discovers relevant backlink opportunities, finds verified contacts, generates personalized outreach emails, and helps you earn authoritative backlinks on autopilot. From prospecting to outreach to guest post creation, everything happens in one streamlined workflow.

products.name: QuackScreen
products.tagline: Capture, drag, share all from the MacBook notch
products.summaryZh: 从MacBook刘海区域捕捉、拖拽、分享一切
products.descriptionZh: QuackScreen 是一款原生 macOS 刘海屏应用，用于快速录制屏幕和截取截图。可直接从菜单栏将剪辑拖拽至 Slack、Mail、Finder 或任意应用中。支持 macOS 26 及以上版本，Apple 芯片。
products.description: QuackScreen is a native macOS notch app for quick screen recordings and screenshots. Drag and drop clips straight from the menu bar into Slack, Mail, Finder, or any app. macOS 26+, Apple silicon.

products.name: MeshPilot
products.tagline: Your AI workspace for terminals, tasks, and agents
products.summaryZh: 你的AI工作空间，用于终端、任务和智能体。
products.descriptionZh: MeshPilot 是一个面向开发者的 AI 工作空间。在单一应用中集成终端、可视化画布和任务面板，让你在同一个地方完成项目的规划、构建与运行。通过语音与工具交互，让 AI 代理执行实际任务，并保持持久记忆，使上下文跨会话延续，无需每次从零开始。
products.description: MeshPilot is an AI workspace for developers. Plan, build, and run your projects in one place - with terminals, a visual canvas, and task boards unified in a single app. Talk to your tools with voice, let AI agents run real tasks, and keep persistent memory so your context carries across sessions instead of starting cold every time.

products.name: Screen Ruler
products.tagline: Edit anything on the web with change tracking
products.summaryZh: 在网页上编辑任何内容并追踪更改
products.descriptionZh: Screen Ruler 是一款用于测量和检查实时网页的 Chrome 扩展。应广大用户需求，现已支持编辑功能。点击元素即可查看其匹配的 CSS，并直接内联调整数值。支持 :hover/:focus 状态及 @media 规则内的编辑，所有更改均会被追踪，并可在同一位置集中查看。
products.description: Screen Ruler is a Chrome extension for measuring and inspecting live web pages. By popular demand, it now supports editing. Click an element, see its matched CSS, tweak values inline. Works on :hover/:focus and inside @media rules with every single change tracked and viewable in one place.

products.name: Darkmoon
products.tagline: Autonomous penetration testing platform
products.summaryZh: 自主渗透测试平台
products.descriptionZh: 大多数AI渗透测试工具止步于Web层。Darkmoon则更进一步。它由专业渗透测试人员构建，整合了18个专用AI代理和80余种进攻性安全工具，可评估Active Directory、Kubernetes、云基础设施、API、CMS及网络。支持自托管、开源、映射MITRE框架，旨在提供基于证据的发现结果、攻击路径及可发布报告。
products.description: Most AI pentesting tools stop at the web layer. Darkmoon goes further. Built by professional pentesters, it combines 18 specialized AI agents and 80+ offensive security tools to assess Active Directory, Kubernetes, cloud infrastructure, APIs, CMSs, and networks. Self-hosted, open-source, MITRE-mapped, and designed to deliver evidence-backed findings, attack paths, and publication-ready reports.

products.name: Foglamp
products.tagline: Ship AI agents you can actually see
products.summaryZh: 部署你能真正看见的AI智能体
products.descriptionZh: 基于Vercel AI SDK构建的AI代理开源可观测层。每行generateText/streamText调用均可获取成本、延迟、令牌、分布式追踪、评估与告警信息——仅需两行代码。
products.description: The open source observability layer for AI agents built on the Vercel AI SDK. Costs, latency, tokens, distributed traces, evals, and alerts for every generateText / streamText call — in two lines.

products.name: Mutter AI Dictation
products.tagline: Private AI dictation that lets you operate offline.
products.summaryZh: 离线运行的私人AI听写，支持离线操作。
products.descriptionZh: 说出粗略想法，Mutter 会在你打字的同时将其打磨成成品文字，速度约为打字的3倍。100%设备端模式可将敏感词保留在你的Mac上。
products.description: Speak the rough thought and Mutter shapes it into finished writing right where you type, about 3x faster than typing. A 100% on-device mode keeps sensitive words on your Mac.

products.name: Narration Room
products.tagline: Turn source text into editable multi-voice scripts
products.summaryZh: 将源文本转换为可编辑的多角色脚本
products.descriptionZh: Narration Room 是一款原生 Mac 应用，并非单纯的文本转语音工具。它将源文本转化为可编辑的多角色脚本，让创作者分配声音、调整表达、在可视化时间线上预览，并导出精良的音频。亮点功能包括：基于源文本的 AI 模式、40 余种本地语音、支持 PDF/Word/Markdown 导入、听写模式；完全离线且本地运行。
products.description: Narration Room is a native Mac app, not just a text-to-speech box. It turns source text into editable multi-voice scripts, then lets creators cast voices, adjust delivery, preview on a visual timeline, and export polished audio. Standouts: source-grounded AI modes, 40+ on-device voices, PDF/Word/Markdown import, dictation mode; offline and local.

products.name: Prism
products.tagline: Al Companion for macOS
products.summaryZh: Al Companion for macOS
products.descriptionZh: Prism — 原生 macOS AI 工作空间，支持多提供商聊天、Prism Hosted、MCP 注册表和 @-工具、Quick AI、浏览器自动化、系统级写作、带关联测验和闪卡的学习工具、文件创建，以及本地优先的隐私保护。
products.description: Prism — The native macOS AI workspace with multi-provider chat, Prism Hosted, MCP registry and @-tools, Quick AI, browser automation, system-wide writing, study tools with linked quizzes and flash cards, file creation, and local-first privacy.

products.name: Upsolve AI
products.tagline: Build grounded, governed, trustworthy data agents
products.summaryZh: 构建有依据、受管控、可信赖的数据代理
products.descriptionZh: Upsolve AI：构建、部署和评估有依据、受管控、可信赖数据代理的平台。Agent Context Studio 是代理分析所需的上下文层。
products.description: Upsolve AI: the platform to build, deploy, and evaluate grounded, governed, trustworthy data agents. Agent Context Studio is the context layer agentic analytics needs.

products.name: Portia
products.tagline: The ultimate 1-click hunter for blocked macOS ports
products.summaryZh: macOS 端口封锁的终极一键扫描工具
products.descriptionZh: Portia 是一款原生 macOS 工具，用于查找占用端口的进程。零闲置 CPU 占用，无需 Shell 插件，一键精准定位。
products.description: Portia is a native macOS utility that hunts down processes blocking your ports. Zero idle CPU, no shell plugins, just one-click precision.

products.name: Midjourney Scanner
products.tagline: 60 second ultrasound-based full-body scanner that beats MRI
products.summaryZh: 60秒超声波全身扫描仪，性能超越MRI
products.descriptionZh: Midjourney Medical 重新构想健康扫描。步入一池温暖的金色浅光，一圈传感器利用柔和的声波在约60秒内详细绘制你的身体图谱。无辐射，无压力。它与Midjourney Spa搭配使用：一个配备热水浴池、桑拿房和冷水池的放松场所，扫描只是其中的附带项目。经常前往，随时间积累丰富的健康数据库，及早发现问题。为每个人提供平价、随性的身体成像。
products.description: Midjourney Medical is reimagining health scanning. Step into a shallow pool of warm, golden light and a ring of sensors uses gentle sound waves to map your body in detail—in about 60 seconds. No radiation, no stress. It pairs with the Midjourney Spa: a relaxing place with hot tubs, saunas, and cold plunges where the scan is just a side effect. Go often, build a rich library of health data over time, and catch things early. Affordable, casual body imaging for everyone.
